verse.name: V1
verse.lines: If you can understand, I've come from another world Where the sons of God shout for joy And the morning stars sing I declare I was there my kind is very rare In His image I was made, Before the foundations were laid I'm of a super race who beheld the father's face

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: I am not of this world, I was expressed into time, I came from another world, Sent to be an end time sign I'm only here for a little while, To prove and manifest His life from another world, I'm going back to that eternal world

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: I came from another world, Unseen by human eyes I'm from another world, paralleled universe Right now I'm standing here, But if you dare to bat your eyes I might just disappear, in the twinkling of an eye To that other world, that eternal world

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: I live in another world, Where I'm influenced to praise By My Theophany, that's been singing to me There's a quickening power, That's is rapturing me To a heavenly place, in a supernatural atmosphere From that other world, From that other world
